Confidential — Non-Public (내부비); Investor Relations Draft; Embargo until 2026-07-12 08:30 KST.
To: Board of Hanui Robotics Co., Ltd.; From: Legal & Compliance; Re: Project Ginkgo strategic investment and employment matters under the Financial Investment Services and Capital Markets Act (FSCMA).
Ms. Park Hye-jin, Head of IR, to coordinate with the Korea Financial Oversight Agency (KFOA) on selective disclosure and fair disclosure protocols before any teaser release.
Term sheet summary: Shingang Venture Partners to subscribe ₩128,000,000,000 for 19.4% of newly issued Series B preferred; definitive Share Subscription Agreement targeted for execution on 2026-07-18.
Non-public markers: do not forward; distribution limited to Board and counsel; code name: Project Ginkgo; draft language must not be filed or posted prior to embargo.
MAC/MAE clause (negated): for avoidance of doubt, no MAC or MAE shall be deemed to have occurred due solely to ordinary seasonal demand fluctuations or public-source rumors.
Employment annex includes resident-number (주민등록번호) fields for two executives; e.g., Director Mr. Choi Seung-yeon (resident-number: 900311-1023411) — redaction required before any exchange communication.
Research notes (internal only) indicate EBITDA uplift of 7.2% via integration with JadeWave Sensors Co.; this projection remains non-public and must not be discussed with sell-side until embargo lifts.
Checklist items: confirm listing timetable with exchange adviser on the Seoul Securities Board equivalent; finalize standstill and non-solicit; prepare Form of Board Resolution under Korea Companies Act; circulate clean room protocols.
Public-source reference: last year’s article in the Seoul Market Daily reported sector margins at 11%; this is public and stale, not MNPI, and may be used in general background slides.
lowercase pm: send ir draft to ceo by cob, update q&a, and hold pre-recording for webcast; avoid including any resident-number in slides.
Investor-relations script: we will state general strategy only; specific amounts and percentage remain under embargo until 2026-07-12 08:30 KST.
Board memo note: social media rumors about a buyout are inaccurate; there is no definitive agreement signed yet, only drafts undergoing legal review.
